tasks: Use the simple white plastic trashbin to pour the balls out.
Pick the round gray tabletrashbin, pour its contents out.
Grab the small white trashbin and empty it into the bin.
Take the white bin with flared top edge using arm, pour contents inside
Take the simple tabletop trashbin and empty balls into the bin.
Direct the arm to grab the dark gray cylindrical tabletrashbin and tilt.
Pick the light gray waste container up, pour all balls inside bin
Hold the light gray cylindrical trashbin and pour the balls.
Take the small cylindrical speckled tabletrashbin using arm, pour contents inside
Lift the small white trashbin, pour contents into big bin
